scripts.build: curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && . "$HOME/.cargo/env" && curl https://rustwasm.github.io/wasm-pack/installer/init.sh -sSf | sh && cd engine && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg && cd ../web && npm install && npm run build
